title: Create release PR from develop into main with curated summary

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Created release PR from develop into main: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/160. PR body includes reviewed delta summary (57 commits, 191 files), key feature/CI/runtime changes, Kanbus metadata churn, and current develop CI run links. Current GitHub state: mergeable=MERGEABLE, mergeStateStatus=BEHIND.
